_meta.description: Fill in the fields marked with [YOUR INPUT] before pasting into your AI assistant. The more specific you are, the more useful the output.
how_to_use: 1. Complete every [YOUR INPUT] field below with real details about your seller and situation.
2. Paste the entire completed JSON into Claude, ChatGPT, or your preferred AI tool.
3. Then ask your question — see suggested_prompts below for proven starting points.
4. The AI will use the SIGNAL framework embedded in this file to give you tailored, specific guidance.
suggested_prompts: Based on my seller profile, write me an opening script for the appraisal — first 2 minutes only.
What are the three things most likely to lose me this listing, and how do I avoid them?
Write a post-appraisal follow-up message for this seller that doesn't feel like a close.
My seller is comparing me with two other agents. What's the specific thing I should say that the others won't?
Write a 30-day conditioning plan tailored to this seller archetype and my agent archetype.
What cognitive biases should I watch for in my next meeting with this seller, and how do I work with them rather than against them?
Draft a suburb report introduction paragraph written specifically for this seller's dominant fear.
What questions should I ask in the appraisal to understand which archetype I'm dealing with before I reveal my price?

agent_profile.archetype_confidence: [YOUR INPUT: How naturally does this archetype come to you? Strong / Moderate / Developing]
agent_profile.recent_results: [YOUR INPUT: Brief — e.g. '3 sales in last 60 days, all within 2% of asking']
agent_profile.primary_claim: [YOUR INPUT: What is the one consistent idea you want every seller to associate with you? e.g. 'I own the data on this suburb' or 'I make selling predictable']
agent_profile.current_claim_concentration_score: [YOUR INPUT: 0–10. Count how many of your last 10 touchpoints reinforced your primary claim]
agent_profile.strongest_proof_mechanism: [YOUR INPUT: What single piece of evidence is most compelling in your current toolkit?]
agent_profile.known_weaknesses: [YOUR INPUT: Where do you lose listings most often? e.g. 'Price conversations' or 'Status sellers who want premium presentation']

seller_profile.archetype: [YOUR INPUT: anxious_upgrader | reluctant_downsizer | cynical_veteran | status_seller | pressure_seller | analytical_controller]
seller_profile.archetype_confidence: [YOUR INPUT: How sure are you about this read? High / Medium / Low — note any signals that made you uncertain]
seller_profile.property_address_or_suburb: [YOUR INPUT: Suburb or street — enough for context]
seller_profile.seller_situation: [YOUR INPUT: Key facts — e.g. 'Couple in their 60s, selling family home of 28 years, downsizing to the coast. No financial pressure. Both emotionally attached.']
seller_profile.known_fears: [YOUR INPUT: What specific fears have they mentioned or signalled? e.g. 'Worried about getting the price right, mentioned a neighbour who 'undersold'']
seller_profile.known_desires: [YOUR INPUT: What outcome do they most want? e.g. 'A dignified process and a result they can be proud to tell friends about']
seller_profile.active_biases_observed: [YOUR INPUT: Which biases are clearly visible in how they speak or behave? Refer to the SIGNAL framework bias list]
seller_profile.how_they_found_you: [YOUR INPUT: Referral / Letterbox drop / Social media / Open home / Existing relationship / Cold call / Other]
seller_profile.competing_agents: [YOUR INPUT: How many agents are they speaking with, and do you know who they are or how they're positioned?]
seller_profile.decision_timeline: [YOUR INPUT: e.g. 'Wants to be on market in 6 weeks' or 'No rush, gathering information']
seller_profile.previous_agent_experience: [YOUR INPUT: Good / Bad / None — any relevant details that might prime their expectations or scepticism]

market_context.suburb_median_trend: [YOUR INPUT: e.g. 'Up 4.2% in last 12 months' or 'Flat to slightly down over 6 months']
recent_comparable_sales: [YOUR INPUT: Address or description, price, days on market — add as many as relevant]
market_context.days_on_market_benchmark: [YOUR INPUT: Current suburb average, e.g. '28 days']

decision_window_assessment.stage_signals_observed: [YOUR INPUT: What did you notice that told you they're at this stage? e.g. 'Attended three of my opens in the last month before calling']
decision_window_assessment.subconscious_shortlist_position: [YOUR INPUT: Are you already on their mental shortlist, or are you starting cold? Likely on / Uncertain / Starting cold]
decision_window_assessment.conditioning_touchpoints_with_this_selle: [YOUR INPUT: What signals of yours has this seller already received? e.g. 'Saw my letterbox drop in March, follows me on Instagram']

appraisal_preparation.opening_move: [YOUR INPUT: Based on your read of the archetype, what is the first thing you should do or say when you walk in? Leave blank to let the AI recommend one.]
appraisal_preparation.first_question: [YOUR INPUT: What is the most important question you could ask in the first 5 minutes? Leave blank to let the AI recommend one.]
appraisal_preparation.price_presentation_approach: [YOUR INPUT: How do you plan to present the price recommendation? Lead with it / Build to it / Let them guess first / Leave blank for AI recommendation]
appraisal_preparation.main_objection_anticipated: [YOUR INPUT: What objection are you most likely to face? e.g. 'They'll say my fee is too high' or 'They'll quote a price I can't justify']
appraisal_preparation.competitor_differentiation: [YOUR INPUT: What do you know or suspect about the competing agents, and how will you position against them?]

conditioning_history.channels_currently_active: [YOUR INPUT: List which of the 5 channels you're currently running — Physical / Digital / Social / Referral / Direct]
conditioning_history.last_touchpoint_with_seller: [YOUR INPUT: What was the most recent signal this seller received from you, and when?]
conditioning_history.gaps_in_conditioning: [YOUR INPUT: Which channels have you been absent from recently? Where is your presence weakest?]
conditioning_history.sprint_week: [YOUR INPUT: If you're running the 30-Day Sprint, which week are you in? 1 / 2 / 3 / 4 / Not started]

session_goal: [YOUR INPUT: What do you most want help with today? Be specific — the more precise your goal, the more useful the AI's response. e.g. 'I have the appraisal tomorrow and I want a rehearsed script for handling the price conversation with a seller who has already been quoted $200k more by another agent.']
